title: tephroseris subfrigida
intro: Tephroseris subfrigida is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and inflammation, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Tephroseris subfrigida is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
